sourceList.title: Walter Stewart, 6th High Steward of Scotland From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
ISABEL de Graham in record of WALTER Stewart, son of JAMES High Steward of Scotland & his [third] wife Egidia de Burgh- Foundation for Medieval Genealogy.

zh.Ralston, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾洛斯頓
zh.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Graham於1289年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire林利斯格福時，她的父親Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale12歲，母親Isabella Kirkpatrick14歲。她於1316年3月2日之後與Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年3月2日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利享年48歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Ralston, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾洛斯頓
zh-hans.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Graham于1289年出生在苏格兰Linlithgowshire林利斯格福时，她的父亲Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale12岁，母亲Isabella Kirkpatrick14岁。她于1316年3月2日之后与Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1337年3月2日在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利享年48岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.
Scottish: variant of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Graham was born in 1289, in Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, was 12 and her mother, Isabella Kirkpatrick, was 14. She married Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland after 2 March 1316, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 March 1337, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 48, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Graham est née en 1289, à Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Isabella Kirkpatrick, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland après 2 mars 1316, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 mars 1337, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Graham 1289 in Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale 12 und ihre Mutter Isabella Kirkpatrick 14. Sie hat nach 2. März 1316 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. März 1337 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Graham è nata il nel 1289 nel Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Isabella Kirkpatrick, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland dopo il 2 marzo 1316, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 marzo 1337, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Grahamが1289年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireリンリスゴウで生まれた時，父Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdaleは12歳，母Isabella Kirkpatrickは14歳であった。1316年3月2日以後にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでWalter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年3月2日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで48歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Graham(이)가 1289년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 린리스고에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Kirkpatrick(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1316년 3월 2일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 3월 2일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Graham nasceu em 1289, em Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Kirkpatrick, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland após 2 de março de 1316, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de março de 1337, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Graham родилась в 1289 г. в местности линьлитгоу, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Kirkpatrick, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland после 2 марта 1316 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 марта 1337 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Graham nació en 1289, en Linlithgow, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Isabella Kirkpatrick, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland después de 2 de marzo de 1316, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1337, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
